![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e77569ba44efe58b30f539/68e77569ba44efe58b30f673_671b79894d392ba5ca5d9842_2023-10-25.avif)
Featured news
QuiX Quantum becomes a member of the ARENA2036 research campus
ARENA2036 welcomes the QuiX Quantum team to the ecosystem! The Dutch-German company takes Europe's leading position in the field of photonic quantum computing and enriches the research campus with another key technology. The special thing about the QuiX Quantum technology is that when using photonic quantum computing, only the competitors have to dress warmly. The photonic processors can be operated almost entirely at room temperature, unlike the familiar method with superconducting qubits, and do not require costly and energy-intensive cooling. This technology offers potential for new applications and scaling possibilities from which many of ARENA2036 members will benefit.
[Read more](https://www.quixquantum.com/news/quix-quantum-becomes-a-member-of-the-arena2036-research-campus)

![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e77569ba44efe58b30f519/68e77569ba44efe58b30f541_circle-3.avif)
Built for hybrid computing
Drop-in
Using reliable telecom-grade components, no cryogenics or custom facilities required. Making it easier to deploy, maintain and scale.
Modular
Field-upgradeable hardware via networked  
modules that grows along the computational workload.
Efficient
Lower total cost of ownership and simplified  
maintenance vs cryogenic competitors.
[Learn more](https://www.quixquantum.com/products/universal-quantum-computer)
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e77569ba44efe58b30f519/68e77569ba44efe58b30f586_quixQuantum_render_1.avif)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e77569ba44efe58b30f519/68e77569ba44efe58b30f592_quixQuantum_render_2.avif)![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e77569ba44efe58b30f519/68e77569ba44efe58b30f591_quixQuantum_render_3.avif)
Demonstrated Core Components
On-chip photon sources with 90% purity and indistinguishability; 120 dB on-chip filtering; Linear optical circuit fidelity > 99%.
Lowest-Loss
Lowest optical loss is essential as it determines whether the photonic quantum system can scale into a commercially useful computer. Quix proprietary tech delivers the lowest-loss quantum photonic chips on the market.
Low Noise
While other QC platforms are limited by noise, aka decoherence, photonic systems are more resistant to noise.
Resource Efficient
More efficient error correction methods can be implemented on photonic QC, leading to lower overhead in hardware components.
Fastest Clock Speed
Photonic QC clock speed can range between 100 MHz to 1 GHz; other’s QC platforms remain below tens of MHz.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e77569ba44efe58b30f519/68e77569ba44efe58b30f541_circle-3.avif)
We are
Fabless
Our production model allows flexible and fast actions in choosing and developing the most competitive quantum photonic solutions and technology.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e77569ba44efe58b30f519/68e77569ba44efe58b30f57e_quixQuantum_36.avif)
Scalable
All our components are integrated in CMOS compatible IP-protected silicon nitride chips providing both high integration density and lowest-loss for a truly scalable quantum photonic platform.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e77569ba44efe58b30f519/68e77569ba44efe58b30f55c_quixQuantum_23.avif)
Leading
Our world-record photonic quantum computing hardware is driving the market, with > 15 devices running in the field, worldwide. We are the first selling a universal photonic quantum computer in Europe.
![](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/68e77569ba44efe58b30f519/68e77569ba44efe58b30f54e_quixQuantum_15.avif)

Demonstrated Core Components
On-chip photon sources with 90% purity and indistinguishability; 120 dB on-chip filtering; Linear optical circuit fidelity > 99%.
Lowest-Loss
Lowest optical loss is essential as it determines whether the photonic quantum system can scale into a commercially useful computer. Quix proprietary tech delivers the lowest-loss quantum photonic chips on the market.
Low Noise
While other QC platforms are limited by noise, aka decoherence, photonic systems are more resistant to noise.
Resource Efficient
More efficient error correction methods can be implemented on photonic QC, leading to lower overhead in hardware components.
Fastest Clock Speed
Photonic QC clock speed can range between 100 MHz to 1 GHz; other’s QC platforms remain below tens of MHz.
We are
Fabless
Our production model allows flexible and fast actions in choosing and developing the most competitive quantum photonic solutions and technology.
Scalable
All our components are integrated in CMOS compatible IP-protected silicon nitride chips providing both high integration density and lowest-loss for a truly scalable quantum photonic platform.
Leading
Our world-record photonic quantum computing hardware is driving the market, with > 15 devices running in the field, worldwide. We are the first selling a universal photonic quantum computer in Europe.
